summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Post-Launch Hardening Features: (1) Referral Attribution Click Tracking, (2) Fraud Flags System, (3) Payout Batch Items. All backend endpoints passed (16/16 tests). All frontend pages loading and functioning correctly.

minor.issue: Fixed ReferralAttribution model - removed duplicate unique constraint on click_token (defined in both field and indexes)

critical_code_review_comments: All three post-launch hardening features implemented correctly
Referral attribution properly tracks clicks with click_token for cookie-based attribution
Fraud flags enhanced with related_type, related_id, is_blocking fields
Payout batch items properly links commissions to payouts for auditing
seed_data_creation: Created test fraud alerts via pytest for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All post-launch hardening features tested and working: referral tracking, fraud flags, payout batch items. Test fraud alerts created during testing are visible in UI with 'cleared' and 'dismissed' status.

referral_attribution_click_tracking.POST /api/referrals/track: WORKING - creates attribution record, returns click_token for cookie
referral_attribution_click_tracking.GET /api/referrals/analytics: WORKING - returns click stats by referral code, recent clicks
referral_attribution_click_tracking.UI /portal/admin/referrals: WORKING - Overview, By Referral Code, Recent Clicks tabs all functional

fraud_flags_system.GET /api/fraud-alerts: WORKING - lists fraud alerts with pagination
fraud_flags_system.GET /api/fraud-alerts/summary: WORKING - returns stats by severity and type
fraud_flags_system.GET /api/fraud-alerts/open-count: WORKING - returns count of open flags
fraud_flags_system.PATCH /api/fraud-alerts/:id: WORKING - updates flag status with review note
fraud_flags_system.UI /portal/admin/fraud-alerts: WORKING - stats cards, filters, table, review side panel

payout_batch_items.GET /api/payouts/:payoutId/items: WORKING - returns batch items (tested 404 for invalid ID)
payout_batch_items.UI /portal/admin/payouts/:batchId: WORKING - batch detail page with proper 404 handling
